name: Zoho Recruit API
what_it_does: Zoho Recruit REST API for cloud-based applicant tracking system. Enables AI agents to manage job postings, retrieve and process candidate records, track application stages, schedule interviews, and integrate recruiting data into HR and CRM workflows. Zoho Recruit integrates natively with Zoho CRM and other Zoho apps, making it ideal for organizations in the Zoho ecosystem.
use_cases: Retrieving and processing candidate applications from recruiting automation agents
Managing job postings and requisitions from talent acquisition agents
Tracking interview feedback and candidate stage progression from recruiting ops agents
Integrating Zoho Recruit candidate data into HRIS and onboarding workflow agents
not_for: Enterprise ATS needs beyond SMB/mid-market scale
best_when: An SMB or mid-market organization using Zoho Recruit wants AI agents to automate candidate processing, track pipeline stages, and integrate recruiting data into Zoho CRM or HRIS.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Candidate personal data (resumes, contact info, employment history) is highly sensitive. GDPR and EEOC compliance required. Handle candidate data per applicable employment law.

auth.notes: Zoho Recruit uses Zoho OAuth 2.0. Scopes include ZohoRecruit.modules.READ/WRITE for candidates, jobs, and interviews. Access tokens expire in 1 hour.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: 1 active job, limited applicants
pricing.paid_tiers: Standard and Enterprise plans scaling jobs and features
pricing.notes: Affordable SMB pricing. Part of Zoho ecosystem. API included on paid plans.

performance.rate_limits: 200 API requests per minute per OAuth client

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Candidate PII including resumes, contact info, and employment history — strict data governance required
COMPLIANCE: GDPR consent and data retention policies for candidate data
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
OAuth tokens expire in 1 hour — refresh token rotation needed for long-running agents
Zoho Recruit API closely mirrors Zoho CRM API style — transferable skills across Zoho products
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Candidate PII and employment records. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes. Multi-region data residency. EEOC compliance considerations for automated screening.

security_score_components.security_notes: Candidate PII and employment data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2 with module-level scopes. Multi-region.
